packs.name: Accessibility Engineer Pack
packs.description: Workflows for coding agents shipping accessible UIs: WCAG 2.2 AA auditing and remediation, accessible component implementation, browser-based verification, and clear documentation of accessibility decisions.

packs.name: AI Engineer Pack
packs.description: Workflows for coding agents building AI-powered features: prompt engineering, LLM integration, evaluation harnesses, AI-aware observability, and safe output handling.

packs.name: API Platform Engineer Pack
packs.description: Workflows for coding agents building API platforms: GraphQL and REST schema design, stable interface contracts, contract testing, source-grounded implementation, and security hardening.

packs.name: Backend Engineer Pack
packs.description: Workflows for coding agents building reliable backend services: API design, database schemas, observability, security hardening, and test-driven development.

packs.name: Cloud Infrastructure Pack
packs.description: Workflows for provisioning and operating cloud infrastructure on AWS, GCP, or Azure: infrastructure as code, container orchestration, security hardening, observability, and automated delivery.

packs.name: Content & Design Pack
packs.description: Produce on-brand visual and written content — brand guidelines, canvas/poster design, generative art, themes, and shareable web artifacts — using Anthropic's official design skills.

packs.name: Data Engineer Pack
packs.description: Workflows for coding agents building data pipelines, ETL systems, and streaming architectures: pipeline design, data quality, schema management, and orchestration.

packs.name: Database Reliability Pack
packs.description: Workflows for database reliability and administration: query optimization, schema migrations, connection pool management, backup and recovery, replication, and database observability.

packs.name: Developer Experience Engineer Pack
packs.description: Workflows for DX and platform-product engineers: SDK design, internal tooling, developer documentation, onboarding automation, API ergonomics, and contributor experience.

packs.name: Document Processing Pack
packs.description: Create, edit, and extract content from office documents — PDF, Word, PowerPoint, and Excel — using Anthropic's official document skills.

packs.name: Engineering Leader Pack
packs.description: A leadership-focused Agent Pack for engineering strategy, planning, quality gates, architecture decisions, delivery health, launch readiness, security risk, and performance health.

claude-code.notes: Skills, Claude plugin wrappers, and portable managed capabilities validate and install through the supported target matrix.

codex.notes: Skills, memory, prompts, templates, tools, and MCP metadata are portable; Claude plugin wrappers are recorded but not natively installed for Codex.

packs.name: Engineering Craft Pack
packs.description: Cross-cutting engineering skills for modern software teams: observability, database design, accessibility, TypeScript discipline, AI feature development, and monorepo tooling.

packs.name: Event-Driven Architect Pack
packs.description: Workflows for coding agents designing event-driven and distributed systems: messaging and event-flow patterns, resilient interface contracts, schema evolution, observability across services, and debugging eventual-consistency failures.

packs.name: Frontend Engineer Pack
packs.description: A starter pack for coding agents building polished, accessible frontend applications with strong TypeScript foundations.

packs.name: Frontend Quality Pack
packs.description: Build, verify, and optimize user-facing interfaces with UI engineering, accessibility, browser evidence, and performance checks.

packs.name: Full Lifecycle Engineer Pack
packs.description: A composed pack for agents that need to take work from discovery through implementation, review, release, and follow-up.

packs.name: Google Cloud Pack
packs.description: Work with Google Cloud Platform — Cloud Run, GKE, BigQuery, Cloud SQL, Firebase, gcloud, and Well-Architected security — using Google's official agent skills.

packs.name: Implementation Core Pack
packs.description: A disciplined implementation workflow for context loading, source-grounded decisions, API design, incremental delivery, monorepo awareness, and tests.

packs.name: ML Engineer Pack
packs.description: Workflows for machine learning engineers: experiment tracking and reproducibility, data pipeline engineering, model serving, MLOps, and observability for ML systems.

packs.name: Mobile Engineer Pack
packs.description: Workflows for building production-quality mobile applications with React Native or Flutter: UI, offline-first patterns, performance, platform permissions, and app store readiness.

packs.name: Next.js & Vercel Pack
packs.description: Build and ship modern React/Next.js apps on Vercel — React best practices, composition patterns, web design guidelines, deploys, and runtime optimization — using Vercel's official agent skills.

packs.name: Open Source Maintainer Pack
packs.description: Workflows for maintainers of open source projects: code review, technical documentation, safe deprecation and migration paths, changelog hygiene, security advisories, and contributor onboarding.

packs.name: Performance Engineer Pack
packs.description: Workflows for coding agents optimizing performance: profiling and hotspot analysis, load testing, Core Web Vitals via browser devtools, observability-driven measurement, and root-cause debugging of regressions.

packs.name: Platform Engineer Pack
packs.description: Workflows for infrastructure, CI/CD pipelines, container operations, observability setup, monorepo tooling, and reliability engineering.

packs.name: Popular Agent Starter Pack
packs.description: A composed starter bundle of popular engineering skills and common Claude Code development plugins for agentic coding workflows.

packs.name: Popular Claude Development Plugins Pack
packs.description: A curated set of broadly useful Claude Code development plugins from Anthropic's official plugin directory.

packs.name: Popular Engineering Skills Pack
packs.description: A high-signal set of commonly useful engineering skills for agentic coding workflows, selected from public lifecycle skills with broad applicability.

packs.name: Popular Integration Plugins Pack
packs.description: A curated set of common Claude Code integration plugins for repository hosting, browser automation, project management, documentation lookup, infrastructure, and semantic code tools.

packs.name: PR Review Pack
packs.description: A starter pack for coding agents reviewing pull requests, enforcing quality gates, and identifying regressions.

packs.name: Product Discovery Pack
packs.description: Clarify ambiguous ideas, refine product direction, and produce implementation-ready specs before coding begins.

packs.name: QA Engineer Pack
packs.description: Workflows for QA engineers and quality-focused developers: contract testing, load testing, browser testing, security validation, and building robust automated test suites.

packs.name: Reliability Debugging Pack
packs.description: Debug failures, challenge risky assumptions, strengthen tests, monitor in production, and harden code before incidents reach users.

packs.name: Rust Engineer Pack
packs.description: Workflows for coding agents building production Rust: ownership and lifetime patterns, idiomatic error handling, async with Tokio, safe unsafe abstractions, and Clippy hygiene.

packs.name: Security Engineer Pack
packs.description: Workflows for application security engineers: threat modeling, OWASP vulnerability review, secrets scanning, dependency auditing, secure design patterns, and security incident response.

packs.name: Shipping Ops Pack
packs.description: Prepare code for release with git hygiene, CI/CD automation, launch readiness, migrations, and durable documentation.

packs.name: SRE Engineer Pack
packs.description: Workflows for site reliability engineers: containerized workloads, infrastructure as code, observability, incident response, and reliability engineering at scale.

packs.name: Superpowers Pack
packs.description: A composed Agent Pack for obra/superpowers, aggregating its core workflow, quality, collaboration, meta authoring, and plugin distribution packs.

packs.name: Superpowers Collaboration Subagents Pack
packs.description: Superpowers skills for isolated worktrees, parallel agent dispatch, subagent-driven implementation, and code review workflows.

packs.name: Superpowers Core Workflow Pack
packs.description: Core Superpowers methodology skills for moving from idea refinement through planning, implementation, TDD, verification, and branch completion.

packs.name: Superpowers Distribution Plugins Pack
packs.description: References the Superpowers plugin and extension distribution manifests for Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, Gemini CLI, and OpenCode.

packs.name: Superpowers Meta Authoring Pack
packs.description: Superpowers meta skills for authoring new tested skills.

packs.name: Superpowers Quality Debugging Pack
packs.description: Superpowers skills for root-cause debugging and disciplined issue investigation.

packs.name: Technical Writer Pack
packs.description: Workflows for coding agents producing engineering documentation: clear technical writing, architecture decision records, codebase archaeology and onboarding guides, and source-grounded, accurate references.

packs.name: TypeScript Engineer Pack
packs.description: Workflows for coding agents writing production TypeScript: strict typing and precise type contracts, test-driven development, interface design, dependency hygiene, and monorepo-aware change scoping.
